ddls:
CREATE TABLE "detectors" (
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detector */,
  "detector_name" TEXT /* Name of the detector */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm used in the detector */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the detector algorithm */,
  "model_path" TEXT /* Path to the machine learning model file */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Status of the model training (e.g., training, trained, failed) */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last trained */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the detector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the profile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the profile settings */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the profile is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detector used for the data stream */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the profile applied to the data stream */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., social media, traffic, cloud services) */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the data file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the file upload (e.g., uploaded, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_detector_id FOREIGN KEY ("detector_id") REFERENCES detectors ("detector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold setting */,
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detector */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the profile */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the threshold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the threshold is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_detector_id FOREIGN KEY ("detector_id") REFERENCES detectors ("detector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the score indicating model performance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the score */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of performance metrics */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "true_positive" INTEGER /* Number of true positives */,
  "true_negative" INTEGER /* Number of true negatives */,
  "false_positive" INTEGER /* Number of false positives */,
  "false_negative" INTEGER /* Number of false negatives */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of data points */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who should be notified */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who configured the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., line chart, histogram) */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the widget */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the widget is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
